title: Build RoadFlow AI document organization system
description: AI-organized chaos → beauty. Accept any input (voice, screenshots, scribbles), understand intent, auto-organize by project/theme, auto-name files. Memory layer makes everything searchable. Visual spatial thinking support.
result: ✅ RoadFlow document AI deployed! Chaos → Beauty pipeline. 5-step system: Capture, Parse, Organize, Beautify, Publish. Accepts any input (voice, screenshots, scribbles). Auto-organizes by project, auto-names files. Live at operations-blackroad-io.pages.dev/roadflow
